items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病的肿瘤标志物：系统评价与荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 间质性肺病（ILD）是类风湿关节炎（RA）严重的关节外并发症，也是导致死亡的主要原因。本荟萃分析旨在全面评估肿瘤相关生物标志物在类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病（RA-ILD）患者中的诊断效用和临床相关性。在PubMed、EMBASE、Web of Science、CBM、万方和CNKI数据库中进行了从建库至2025年4月1日的系统性文献检索。我们纳入了遵循PICOS框架、比较RA-ILD与RA-非ILD患者肿瘤标志物水平的病例对照和队列研究。使用纽卡斯尔-渥太华量表（NOS）评估研究质量。采用随机效应模型计算合并效应量，表示为标准化均数差（SMD）及其95%置信区间（CI）。使用汇总受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线评估诊断准确性。共纳入36项研究，包含7300例RA患者。与RA-非ILD患者相比，RA-ILD患者的CA125（SMD = 1.10，95%CI 0.47-1.72）、CA199（SMD = 0.90，95%CI 0.56-1.23）、CA153（SMD = 1.70，95%CI 1.16-2.23）、CEA（SMD = 0.58，95%CI 0.24-0.92）、KL-6（SMD = 1.68，95%CI 1.22-2.14）、NSE（SMD = 0.32，95%CI 0.16-0.48）和HE4（SMD = 1.87，95%CI 1.60-2.14）水平显著升高。在使用剪补法调整发表偏倚后，CYFRA21-1也显著升高（SMD = 0.48，95%CI 0.06-0.89）。在区分RA-ILD方面，KL-6显示出最高的诊断准确性（AUC = 0.964），其次是CYFRA21-1（AUC = 0.906）。我们的发现主要基于中国队列的证据，支持CA125、CA199、CA153、CEA、KL-6、NSE、HE4和CYFRA21-1作为RA-ILD生物标志物的效用。KL-6和CYFRA21-1优越的诊断性能表明，它们作为多标志物组合的一部分，在区分RA-ILD与RA-非ILD及风险分层方面具有潜在的临床实用性，为识别这种高风险RA并发症提供了一种补充影像学的方法。PROSPERO CRD42022362487。

items.title: Immunopathogenesis of neuropsychiatric systemic lupus erythematosus: current insights into inflammatory and thrombotic pathways.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is an autoimmune disease characterized by loss of immune tolerance, systemic inflammation, autoantibody production, and immune complex formation. Neuropsychiatric systemic lupus erythematosus (NPSLE) represents one of the most severe manifestations of the disease and may involve both the central and peripheral nervous systems. Its pathogenesis remains incompletely understood and reflects the interplay among systemic immune dysregulation, vascular injury, blood-brain and blood-CSF barrier dysfunction, and local neuroinflammatory processes.Current evidence supports two partially overlapping pathogenic pathways: an autoimmune-inflammatory and a thrombo-ischemic pathway. These mechanisms promote disruption of the blood-brain barrier, infiltration of immune cells into the central nervous system, activation of microglia, and neuronal dysfunction. Increasing evidence also highlights the role of neutrophil extracellular traps, complement activation, type I interferon signaling, and autoreactive lymphocytes in driving neuroinflammation.The heterogeneity of clinical manifestations and the diversity of underlying mechanisms make NPSLE a major diagnostic and therapeutic challenge. This review summarizes current knowledge on the immunopathogenesis of NPSLE, with particular attention to the strength of evidence supporting individual mechanisms. Human clinical studies provide important associative data, whereas animal models and cell-based systems offer mechanistic insight into selected pathways. We also discuss emerging biomarkers, limitations of current evidence, and potential therapeutic targets that may improve future diagnosis, stratification, and management of NPSLE.

items.titleZh: 神经精神系统性红斑狼疮的免疫发病机制：当前对炎症和血栓形成通路的见解
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种以免疫耐受丧失、全身性炎症、自身抗体产生和免疫复合物形成为特征的自身免疫性疾病。神经精神系统性红斑狼疮（NPSLE）是该疾病最严重的表现之一，可能累及中枢和周围神经系统。其发病机制尚不完全清楚，反映了全身免疫失调、血管损伤、血脑和血CSF屏障功能障碍以及局部神经炎症过程之间的相互作用。当前证据支持两种部分重叠的致病通路：自身免疫-炎症通路和血栓-缺血通路。这些机制促进血脑屏障破坏、免疫细胞浸润中枢神经系统、小胶质细胞激活和神经元功能障碍。越来越多的证据也强调了中性粒细胞胞外陷阱、补体激活、I型干扰素信号传导和自身反应性淋巴细胞在驱动神经炎症中的作用。临床表现的异质性和潜在机制的多样性使NPSLE成为诊断和治疗的主要挑战。本综述总结了关于NPSLE免疫发病机制的当前知识，特别关注支持各机制的证据强度。人类临床研究提供了重要的关联数据，而动物模型和基于细胞的系统则对特定通路提供了机制性见解。我们还讨论了新兴生物标志物、当前证据的局限性以及可能改善未来NPSLE诊断、分层和管理的潜在治疗靶点。

items.title: Performance of common fetal growth standards in pregnancies affected by systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: The aim of this study was to compare the performance of different fetal growth reference standards-Hadlock, INTERGROWTH-21st, and World Health Organization-in pregnancies complicated by systemic lupus erythematosus. This retrospective cohort study was conducted at a tertiary referral center and included singleton pregnancies delivered at ≥22 weeks of gestation. Pregnant women were classified into two groups: those with systemic lupus erythematosus, defined by ≥4 American College of Rheumatology criteria, and controls without autoimmune disease. Estimated fetal weight obtained from routine obstetric ultrasonography was converted into gestational age-specific percentiles using the Hadlock, INTERGROWTH-21st, and World Health Organization reference standards. Correlations between ultrasound-based fetal weight percentiles and birth weight percentiles were assessed using Spearman's rank correlation coefficient. Of 225 initially identified pregnancies, 179 fetuses were included in the final analysis, comprising 124 from women with systemic lupus erythematosus (69.3%) and 55 from controls (30.7%). Data distribution was non-normal. Across all growth standards, fetuses from women with systemic lupus erythematosus demonstrated lower mean weight percentiles than those from controls. Mean percentiles for controls versus the systemic lupus erythematosus group were 47.1% versus 38.4% using Hadlock, 63.3% versus 55.2% using INTERGROWTH-21st, and 51.7% versus 42.6% using World Health Organization. No statistically significant differences were observed among the three reference standards; however, INTERGROWTH-21st consistently yielded higher percentile values in both groups. Although fetal weight classification varied according to the growth standard used, pregnancies complicated by systemic lupus erythematosus consistently exhibited lower fetal weight percentiles. Awareness of systematic differences among commonly used growth references is essential, as these may influence the detection of fetal growth restriction.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮妊娠中常见胎儿生长标准的表现
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在比较不同胎儿生长参考标准——Hadlock、INTERGROWTH-21st和世界卫生组织——在系统性红斑狼疮妊娠中的表现。这项回顾性队列研究在一家三级转诊中心进行，纳入孕周≥22周的单胎妊娠。孕妇分为两组：系统性红斑狼疮组（符合美国风湿病学会≥4项标准）和无自身免疫性疾病的对照组。通过常规产科超声获得的估计胎儿体重，使用Hadlock、INTERGROWTH-21st和世界卫生组织参考标准转换为孕周特异性百分位数。采用Spearman秩相关系数评估超声胎儿体重百分位数与出生体重百分位数之间的相关性。在最初确定的225例妊娠中，最终分析纳入179例胎儿，其中124例来自系统性红斑狼疮孕妇（69.3%），55例来自对照组（30.7%）。数据分布非正态。在所有生长标准中，系统性红斑狼疮孕妇的胎儿平均体重百分位数均低于对照组。对照组与系统性红斑狼疮组的平均百分位数分别为：Hadlock标准47.1% vs 38.4%，INTERGROWTH-21st标准63.3% vs 55.2%，世界卫生组织标准51.7% vs 42.6%。三种参考标准之间未观察到统计学显著差异；然而，INTERGROWTH-21st在两组中均持续产生较高的百分位数值。尽管胎儿体重分类因所用生长标准而异，但系统性红斑狼疮妊娠始终表现出较低的胎儿体重百分位数。了解常用生长参考标准之间的系统性差异至关重要，因为这些差异可能影响胎儿生长受限的检测。

items.title: Association between antiphospholipid syndrome and outcomes of singleton pregnancies conceived via assisted reproductive technology (ART): A Nationwide Inpatient Sample analysis 2005-2020.
items.abstract: Antiphospholipid syndrome (APS) is an autoimmune disorder that increases the risk of blood clots and pregnancy complications. While the effects of APS on natural pregnancies are known, its impact on pregnancies conceived using assisted reproductive technologies (ART), such as in vitro fertilization (IVF), is unclear. This study aims to investigate the outcomes of ART pregnancies in individuals with APS. Data from the Nationwide Inpatient Sample (NIS) from 2005 to 2020 were analyzed. Individuals with singleton pregnancies conceived via ART were categorized into those with and without APS. The primary outcomes assessed were maternal and fetal complications and were compared between individuals with and without APS. After propensity-score matching, data from 3730 individuals (746 with APS) were analyzed. Individuals with APS had a significantly higher risk of preeclampsia (odds ratio [OR] = 1.87), cesarean delivery (OR = 1.29), uterine atony (OR = 1.54), disseminated intravascular coagulation (DIC) (OR = 3.96), HELLP syndrome (OR = 2.48), and fetal growth restriction (FGR) (OR = 1.41) compared to those without APS. In individuals over 35 years old, APS was associated with increased risks of preeclampsia (OR = 1.65), DIC (OR = 4.07), and HELLP syndrome (OR = 1.75). Among individuals ≤35 years old, APS increased the risks of preeclampsia (OR = 2.35), cesarean delivery (OR = 1.53), HELLP syndrome (OR = 4.31), and stillbirth/intrauterine fetal death (OR = 2.44). APS in ART pregnancies is associated with increased maternal and fetal complications.

items.titleZh: 抗磷脂综合征与辅助生殖技术（ART）单胎妊娠结局的关联：2005-2020年全国住院患者样本分析
items.abstractZh: 抗磷脂综合征（APS）是一种自身免疫性疾病，会增加血栓和妊娠并发症的风险。虽然APS对自然妊娠的影响已知，但其对使用辅助生殖技术（ART）（如体外受精（IVF））受孕的妊娠的影响尚不清楚。本研究旨在调查APS患者中ART妊娠的结局。分析了2005年至2020年全国住院患者样本（NIS）的数据。通过ART受孕的单胎妊娠个体被分为有APS和无APS两组。评估的主要结局为母体和胎儿并发症，并在有APS和无APS的个体之间进行比较。经过倾向评分匹配后，分析了3730名个体（其中746名患有APS）的数据。与无APS的个体相比，患有APS的个体发生子痫前期（比值比[OR]=1.87）、剖宫产（OR=1.29）、子宫张力缺乏（OR=1.54）、弥散性血管内凝血（DIC）（OR=3.96）、HELLP综合征（OR=2.48）和胎儿生长受限（FGR）（OR=1.41）的风险显著更高。在年龄超过35岁的个体中，APS与子痫前期（OR=1.65）、DIC（OR=4.07）和HELLP综合征（OR=1.75）风险增加相关。在年龄≤35岁的个体中，APS增加了子痫前期（OR=2.35）、剖宫产（OR=1.53）、HELLP综合征（OR=4.31）和死产/宫内胎儿死亡（OR=2.44）的风险。ART妊娠中的APS与母体和胎儿并发症增加相关。

items.title: Evaluation of ferroptosis markers and laboratory findings in patients with juvenile idiopathic arthritis.
items.abstract: Juvenile idiopathic arthritis is the most prevalent chronic rheumatic disease of childhood. Ferroptosis is a distinct, regulated form of cell death that is iron-dependent and driven by the accumulation of lipid peroxides on cell membranes. The aim of this study was to measure the soluble transferrin receptor and malondialdehyde levels as ferroptosis markers in Turkish children with Juvenile idiopathic arthritis. We also evaluated the laboratory findings in the patients. Thirty children diagnosed with Juvenile idiopathic arthritis and 30 healthy children were included in the study. The sTfR1 and the malondialdehyde levels were measured by enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay. The mean age of the patient group was 10.13±3.98, and the mean age of the control group was 10.67±3.21. Blood soluble transferrin receptor and malondialdehyde levels did not differ between the patient and control groups (p>0.05). In contrast, the p-value for the malondialdehyde results was statistically borderline. In the patient group, sedimentation rates were found to correlate with serum amyloid A, C-reactive protein levels. In addition, the highest malondialdehyde levels were found in systemic Juvenile idiopathic arthritis, and the highest soluble transferrin receptor levels were found in psoriatic arthritis subtypes. Both malondialdehyde and soluble transferrin receptor levels were lowest in those treated with methotrexate. Although our findings show that soluble transferrin receptor and malondialdehyde levels did not differ between patient and control groups, larger-scale studies are needed to evaluate more specific biomarkers and/or targeted tissue sampling in different subtypes, controlling for confounding factors such as treatment. This could open new horizons for therapies targeting ferroptosis.

items.titleZh: 幼年特发性关节炎患者铁死亡标志物及实验室检查结果的评估。
items.abstractZh: 幼年特发性关节炎是儿童期最常见的慢性风湿性疾病。铁死亡是一种独特的、受调控的细胞死亡形式，依赖于铁并由细胞膜上脂质过氧化物的积累驱动。本研究旨在测量土耳其幼年特发性关节炎儿童的可溶性转铁蛋白受体和丙二醛水平作为铁死亡标志物。我们还评估了患者的实验室检查结果。研究纳入30名诊断为幼年特发性关节炎的儿童和30名健康儿童。通过酶联免疫吸附试验测量sTfR1和丙二醛水平。患者组平均年龄为10.13±3.98岁，对照组平均年龄为10.67±3.21岁。患者组与对照组之间的血可溶性转铁蛋白受体和丙二醛水平无差异（p>0.05）。相反，丙二醛结果的p值在统计学上处于临界值。在患者组中，血沉与血清淀粉样蛋白A、C反应蛋白水平相关。此外，丙二醛水平在系统性幼年特发性关节炎中最高，可溶性转铁蛋白受体水平在银屑病关节炎亚型中最高。接受甲氨蝶呤治疗的患者中，丙二醛和可溶性转铁蛋白受体水平均最低。尽管我们的研究结果显示可溶性转铁蛋白受体和丙二醛水平在患者组和对照组之间无差异，但仍需更大规模的研究来评估不同亚型中更特异的生物标志物和/或靶向组织采样，并控制治疗等混杂因素。这可能为靶向铁死亡的治疗开辟新前景。

items.title: Case Report: Successful conversion surgery following chemo-antiangiogenic therapy in a lung adenocarcinoma patient with active rheumatoid arthritis and rare EGFR mutation after immunotherapy-triggered flare.
items.abstract: First-line treatment strategy for advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) patients with concurrent driver mutations, high PD-L1 expression, and active autoimmune disease poses a significant challenge with limited guidance. A 41-year-old male with newly diagnosed active rheumatoid arthritis (RA) was found to have right lower lobe adenocarcinoma with ipsilateral interlobar pleural nodules (cT4N0M1a, stage IVA). Molecular profiling revealed a non-classical EGFR exon 18 mutation (E709_T710>del) with TP53 co-mutation and high PD-L1 expression (TPS 55%). Initial therapy with 'pemetrexed + carboplatin + tislelizumab' was administered. However, after only one cycle, the patient experienced a significant flare of RA symptoms and worsened serological markers, necessitating permanent discontinuation of immunotherapy. The RA flare was managed with methylprednisolone 1 mg/kg/day followed by a slow prednisone taper and sulfasalazine. Treatment was switched to 'pemetrexed + carboplatin + bevacizumab'. After six cycles, restaging by contrast-enhanced CT showed partial response (PR) of the primary lesion and pleural metastases. Preoperative PET-CT demonstrated complete metabolic response of pleural nodules. Following multidisciplinary team (MDT) assessment and adherence to a strict 6-week preoperative bevacizumab washout period (based on pharmacokinetic reasoning and NCCN guidelines, though prospective data are lacking), the patient underwent conversion from thoracoscopic to open right lower lobectomy with systematic lymph node dissection due to severe fibrosis and frozen hilar lymph nodes. Postoperative pathology confirmed downstaging to ypT2N1 (1 of 12 positive lymph nodes), with a tumor regression grade (TRG) of 1 according to IASLC 2020 criteria (residual tumor cells <10%, significant regression). Postoperative maintenance therapy with 'bevacizumab + pemetrexed' was continued for 12 cycles, and the patient remains disease-free with a progression-free survival (PFS) of 20 months at last follow-up (on a regular imaging surveillance schedule). For advanced NSCLC patients with active autoimmune disease, immune checkpoint inhibitor therapy requires extreme caution even in the presence of high PD-L1 expression. Chemotherapy combined with antiangiogenic therapy can be an effective and safe induction strategy in this complex population. It may create a potential opportunity for conversion surgery in well-responding patients, enabling long-term disease control. This case underscores the critical importance of highly individualized, multidisciplinary treatment decision-making.

items.titleZh: 病例报告：免疫治疗后发作的活动性类风湿关节炎伴罕见EGFR突变肺腺癌患者经化疗联合抗血管生成治疗后成功实施转化手术
items.abstractZh: 对于同时存在驱动基因突变、高PD-L1表达和活动性自身免疫性疾病的晚期非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者，一线治疗策略面临重大挑战且指导有限。一名41岁男性新诊断为活动性类风湿关节炎（RA），发现右肺下叶腺癌伴同侧叶间胸膜结节（cT4N0M1a，IVA期）。分子检测显示非经典EGFR外显子18突变（E709_T710>del）伴TP53共突变和高PD-L1表达（TPS 55%）。初始治疗采用“培美曲塞+卡铂+替雷利珠单抗”。然而，仅一个周期后，患者出现RA症状显著发作和血清学标志物恶化，需永久停用免疫治疗。RA发作采用甲泼尼龙1 mg/kg/天治疗，随后缓慢减量泼尼松并加用柳氮磺吡啶。治疗转为“培美曲塞+卡铂+贝伐珠单抗”。六个周期后，增强CT再分期显示原发灶和胸膜转移部分缓解（PR）。术前PET-CT显示胸膜结节完全代谢缓解。经多学科团队（MDT）评估并严格遵守术前6周贝伐珠单抗洗脱期（基于药代动力学原理和NCCN指南，尽管缺乏前瞻性数据），患者因严重纤维化和肺门淋巴结冰冻，由胸腔镜转为开胸右肺下叶切除术加系统性淋巴结清扫。术后病理证实降期为ypT2N1（12个淋巴结中1个阳性），根据IASLC 2020标准肿瘤消退等级（TRG）为1（残留肿瘤细胞<10%，显著消退）。术后维持治疗继续“贝伐珠单抗+培美曲塞”共12个周期，末次随访时患者无病生存，无进展生存期（PFS）为20个月（按常规影像监测计划）。对于活动性自身免疫性疾病的晚期NSCLC患者，即使存在高PD-L1表达，免疫检查点抑制剂治疗也需极度谨慎。化疗联合抗血管生成治疗可成为这一复杂人群有效且安全的诱导策略，可能为反应良好的患者创造转化手术的潜在机会，实现长期疾病控制。本病例强调了高度个体化、多学科治疗决策的关键重要性。

items.title: Development and validation of a risk stratification model for cardiovascular disease in patients with radiographic axial spondyloarthritis (r-axSpA): a retrospective study.
items.abstract: Patients with radiographic axial spondyloarthritis (r-axSpA) face an elevated risk of cardiovascular disease (CVD), yet practical prediction tools remain limited. This study aimed to develop a parsimonious risk stratification model for CVD risk in r-axSpA patients using routine clinical variables. This single-center retrospective cross-sectional study enrolled 259 r-axSpA patients (65 with CVD). Least absolute shrinkage and selection operator (LASSO) regression and multivariate logistic regression were used to identify independent predictors. The model's discriminative ability, calibration, and clinical utility were assessed using area under the curve (AUC), calibration plots, and decision curve analysis (DCA). Four independent predictors were identified: age, hypertension, diabetes mellitus, and alkaline phosphatase (ALP). The model demonstrated excellent discriminative ability in the training set (AUC = 0.888, 95% CI: 0.833-0.942; sensitivity 92.2%; specificity 74.6%) and acceptable performance in the validation set (AUC = 0.741). Calibration was satisfactory (Brier score: 0.115), and DCA confirmed positive net benefit. Subgroup analysis showed robust performance across both sexes. This study developed a simple yet robust risk stratification tool for CVD in r-axSpA patients using four readily available variables. The model showed good discriminative ability and clinical utility, with ALP emerging as a novel predictor. External validation in prospective cohorts is warranted before clinical implementation.

items.titleZh: 放射学中轴型脊柱关节炎（r-axSpA）患者心血管疾病风险分层模型的开发与验证：一项回顾性研究
items.abstractZh: 放射学中轴型脊柱关节炎（r-axSpA）患者面临心血管疾病（CVD）风险升高，但实用的预测工具仍然有限。本研究旨在利用常规临床变量为r-axSpA患者开发一个简洁的CVD风险分层模型。这项单中心回顾性横断面研究纳入了259名r-axSpA患者（其中65名患有CVD）。采用最小绝对收缩和选择算子（LASSO）回归及多变量逻辑回归识别独立预测因子。通过曲线下面积（AUC）、校准图和决策曲线分析（DCA）评估模型的区分能力、校准度和临床实用性。共识别出四个独立预测因子：年龄、高血压、糖尿病和碱性磷酸酶（ALP）。该模型在训练集中表现出优异的区分能力（AUC = 0.888，95% CI: 0.833-0.942；敏感性92.2%；特异性74.6%），在验证集中表现可接受（AUC = 0.741）。校准度令人满意（Brier评分：0.115），DCA确认了正向净获益。亚组分析显示在男女中均表现稳健。本研究利用四个易获取的变量为r-axSpA患者开发了一个简单而稳健的CVD风险分层工具。该模型显示出良好的区分能力和临床实用性，其中ALP作为新的预测因子出现。在临床实施前，需要在前瞻性队列中进行外部验证。

items.title: Mechanistic insights into how gut homeostasis and immune-system crosstalk shape ankylosing spondylitis.
items.abstract: Ankylosing spondylitis (AS) is a chronic immune-mediated inflammatory disease that primarily affects the axial skeleton and entheseal structures. Although the role of HLA-B27 is well established, AS pathogenesis is multifactorial, and accumulating evidence suggests that disruption of intestinal homeostasis and the gut-joint axis may contribute to disease pathobiology. AS-associated gut dysbiosis is characterized by reduced microbial diversity and compositional alterations that may be associated with mucosal immune activation, increased intestinal permeability, and systemic inflammatory priming. Mechanistically, altered microbial signals and barrier dysfunction may converge on key immunological pathways, including the IL-23/IL-17 axis, and may promote the activation or trafficking of innate-like lymphocytes, such as MAIT cells, γδ T cells, and ILC3s, thereby contributing to inflammation and abnormal bone remodeling. In addition to community structure, microbial metabolites, including short-chain fatty acids and tryptophan-derived indole metabolites, help regulate epithelial integrity and immunoregulatory homeostasis; their perturbation may favor pro-inflammatory immune programs relevant to AS. This review summarizes recent evidence on dysbiosis, barrier dysfunction, and immunometabolic signaling in the gut-joint axis, while critically distinguishing established immune-targeted therapies from experimental microbiota-directed and combination strategies.

items.title: The gut-joint axis in gout: microbial outer membrane vesicles and m 6 A-mediated metabolic-epigenetic coupling from acute flare to chronicity.
items.abstract: Gout is increasingly recognized as a systemic metabolic disorder driven by the "gut-joint axis" rather than a purely localized joint disease. However, the exact mechanisms by which intestinal dysfunction causes persistent joint inflammation remain unclear. This review proposes a novel "Two-Hit" theoretical framework mediated by bacterial outer membrane vesicles (OMVs) and N6-methyladenosine (m 6 A) epigenetic modifications. We hypothesize that the high uric acid environment in the gut exerts a metabolic stress on specific bacteria, driving the release of highly pathogenic OMVs. Following intestinal barrier damage, these OMVs, working synergistically with intestinal-derived lipopolysaccharide (LPS), act as cross-organ messengers to deliver a "two-hit" strike to the joint. First, they prime synovial macrophages (SMs) by upregulating m 6 A methylation (via the methyltransferase-like 3 enzyme, METTL3), creating a pro-inflammatory epigenetic memory. Second, they induce metabolic reprogramming, characterized by enhanced glycolysis and local acidification in synovial fibroblasts, which physically forces the crystallization of uric acid. Based on this theoretical model, we evaluate emerging therapeutic strategies. These include stabilizing bacterial membranes to block OMV release, using biomimetic nanotechnology to intercept circulating vesicles, and targeting m 6 A enzymes to erase inflammatory memory. Ultimately, this hypothesis suggests a potential framework to conceptually shift gout management from symptom relief toward source-to-epigenetic precision interventions, while highlighting the necessary directions for future experimental validation.

items.titleZh: 痛风中的肠-关节轴：微生物外膜囊泡与m6A介导的代谢-表观遗传耦合从急性发作到慢性化
items.abstractZh: 痛风越来越被认为是一种由“肠-关节轴”驱动的全身性代谢紊乱，而非纯粹的局部关节疾病。然而，肠道功能障碍导致持续性关节炎症的确切机制仍不清楚。本综述提出了一种由细菌外膜囊泡（OMVs）和N6-甲基腺苷（m6A）表观遗传修饰介导的新型“二次打击”理论框架。我们假设肠道内的高尿酸环境对特定细菌施加代谢压力，驱动高致病性OMVs的释放。在肠道屏障损伤后，这些OMVs与肠道来源的脂多糖（LPS）协同作用，作为跨器官信使对关节传递“二次打击”。首先，它们通过上调m6A甲基化（通过甲基转移酶样3酶，METTL3）引发滑膜巨噬细胞（SMs），形成促炎性表观遗传记忆。其次，它们诱导代谢重编程，表现为滑膜成纤维细胞中糖酵解增强和局部酸化，从而物理上迫使尿酸结晶。基于这一理论模型，我们评估了新兴治疗策略。这些策略包括稳定细菌膜以阻断OMV释放，使用仿生纳米技术拦截循环囊泡，以及靶向m6A酶以消除炎症记忆。最终，这一假说提出了一个潜在框架，将痛风管理从症状缓解概念性地转向源头到表观遗传的精准干预，同时指出了未来实验验证的必要方向。

items.title: Coexistence of systemic lupus erythematosus and sarcoidosis: A case-based review.
items.abstract: Sarcoidosis and systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) are chronic multisystem inflammatory diseases with distinct pathogenetic mechanisms but overlapping clinical and immunological features. Their coexistence is exceedingly rare and may result in diagnostic delay or misinterpretation of disease activity. A 50-year-old woman presented with photosensitive facial rash, oral ulcers, constitutional symptoms, cytopenia, hypocomplementemia, and markedly elevated anti-double-stranded DNA titers, fulfilling the 2019 ACR/EULAR classification criteria for SLE. During follow-up, atypical cutaneous lesions involving the external auditory canal were identified. Histopathological examination revealed non-caseating granulomatous inflammation. Further evaluation with thoracic imaging and endobronchial ultrasound-guided biopsy demonstrated bilateral hilar and mediastinal lymphadenopathy with granulomatous inflammation, confirming the diagnosis of sarcoidosis. Treatment with hydroxychloroquine, systemic corticosteroids, and methotrexate led to significant clinical and laboratory improvement over a six-month follow-up period. This case highlights the importance of considering a coexisting diagnosis when atypical clinical or histopathological findings emerge in patients with established autoimmune disease, with histological confirmation playing a central role in accurate diagnosis.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮与结节病共存：基于病例的综述
items.abstractZh: 结节病和系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是慢性多系统炎症性疾病，具有不同的发病机制但重叠的临床和免疫学特征。它们的共存极为罕见，可能导致诊断延迟或疾病活动性误判。一名50岁女性出现光敏性面部皮疹、口腔溃疡、全身症状、血细胞减少、低补体血症和显著升高的抗双链DNA滴度，符合2019年ACR/EULAR SLE分类标准。随访期间，发现涉及外耳道的非典型皮肤病变。组织病理学检查显示非干酪样肉芽肿性炎症。进一步通过胸部影像和支气管内超声引导活检证实双侧肺门和纵隔淋巴结肿大伴肉芽肿性炎症，确诊为结节病。使用羟氯喹、全身性皮质类固醇和甲氨蝶呤治疗六个月后，临床和实验室指标显著改善。本病例强调，在已确诊自身免疫性疾病的患者中出现非典型临床或组织病理学表现时，应考虑共存诊断的可能性，而组织学确认在准确诊断中起核心作用。

items.title: Long-term stability of autoantibody-based serological profiles in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a heterogeneous autoimmune disease marked by diverse autoantibodies. While serological clusters have been associated with distinct clinical phenotypes, most existing studies rely on single time-point assessments and implicitly assume long-term stability of autoantibody profiles. Whether these profiles remain stable over prolonged follow-up has not been systematically evaluated. This study aimed to evaluate the longitudinal serological changes in SLE patients. A retrospective study was conducted on 82 SLE patients at a hospital in northern Spain. Clinical data and immunological profiles were collected at baseline and during follow-up. Autoantibodies analyzed included ANA, anti-dsDNA, anti-Sm, anti-RNP, anti-SSa (Ro)/SSb (La), and antiphospholipid antibodies (aCL, aB2GPI, LA). Patients were classified into four serological clusters based on baseline antibody profiles. The cohort was predominantly female (90%), with a mean follow-up of ∼14 years. ANA was positive in nearly all patients. Regarding ANA specificities, anti SSa (Ro) antibodies were the most frequently founded in 28 patients (34%) followed by anti-dsDNA in 19 (23%), anti RNP in 11 (13%), anti SSb (La) in 8 (10%) and lastly anti Sm in 7 (9%). Only 9 of 66 patients (14%) changed serological clusters during follow-up, and most changes did not alter baseline cluster assignment. Most seroconversions involved anti-RNP, anti-Ro, and anti-Sm. Among aPLs, persistent changes occurred in 5 patients, and transient changes in 12. Overall, 86% of patients maintained stable serological profiles. These findings demonstrate that autoantibody-based serological profiles in SLE are highly stable over long-term follow-up, supporting their validity as enduring disease classifiers with potential prognostic and therapeutic implications.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中基于自身抗体的血清学谱的长期稳定性
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种以多种自身抗体为特征的异质性自身免疫性疾病。虽然血清学聚类与不同的临床表型相关，但大多数现有研究依赖于单次时间点评估，并隐含地假设自身抗体谱具有长期稳定性。这些谱在长期随访中是否保持稳定尚未得到系统评估。本研究旨在评估SLE患者的纵向血清学变化。在西班牙北部一家医院对82名SLE患者进行了一项回顾性研究。在基线及随访期间收集临床数据和免疫学谱。分析的自身抗体包括ANA、抗dsDNA、抗Sm、抗RNP、抗SSa（Ro）/SSb（La）以及抗磷脂抗体（aCL、aB2GPI、LA）。根据基线抗体谱将患者分为四个血清学聚类。队列主要为女性（90%），平均随访时间约14年。几乎所有患者ANA均为阳性。关于ANA特异性，抗SSa（Ro）抗体最常见，见于28名患者（34%），其次是抗dsDNA（19名，23%）、抗RNP（11名，13%）、抗SSb（La）（8名，10%）和抗Sm（7名，9%）。66名患者中仅有9名（14%）在随访期间改变了血清学聚类，且大多数改变未改变基线聚类分配。大多数血清转换涉及抗RNP、抗Ro和抗Sm。在aPL中，5名患者发生持续性变化，12名患者发生一过性变化。总体而言，86%的患者保持了稳定的血清学谱。这些发现表明，SLE中基于自身抗体的血清学谱在长期随访中高度稳定，支持其作为具有潜在预后和治疗意义的持久性疾病分类器的有效性。

items.title: Co-occurrence of Kikuchi-Fujimoto Disease, Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, and Macrophage Activation Syndrome Presenting With Acute Pancreatitis and Myositis in an Adolescent Male Patient.
items.abstract: Kikuchi-Fujimoto disease (KFD) is a rare, self-limiting necrotizing lymphadenitis that can mimic infection, malignancy, or autoimmune disease. Its coexistence with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and macrophage activation syndrome (MAS) is uncommon and presents significant diagnostic challenges. We report a 15-year-old boy who presented with prolonged fever, generalized lymphadenopathy, cytopenias, oral ulcers, myositis, and acute pancreatitis. Laboratory evaluation revealed positive antinuclear and anti-Smith antibodies, hypocomplementemia, markedly elevated serum ferritin levels (27,650 ng/mL), hypertriglyceridemia, and hypofibrinogenemia. Lymph node biopsy demonstrated histiocytic necrotizing lymphadenitis consistent with KFD. The patient fulfilled the diagnostic criteria for SLE complicated by MAS and acute pancreatitis. Early initiation of high-dose corticosteroids, intravenous immunoglobulin, cyclophosphamide, cyclosporine, and hydroxychloroquine resulted in clinical and biochemical remission. This case highlights the importance of recognizing KFD-SLE overlap with MAS in adolescents presenting with persistent fever and cytopenias, as prompt immunosuppressive therapy can be life-saving.

items.titleZh: 一名青少年男性患者同时出现菊池-藤本病、系统性红斑狼疮和巨噬细胞活化综合征，表现为急性胰腺炎和肌炎
items.abstractZh: 菊池-藤本病（KFD）是一种罕见的自限性坏死性淋巴结炎，可模拟感染、恶性肿瘤或自身免疫性疾病。其与系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）和巨噬细胞活化综合征（MAS）共存的情况并不常见，且带来显著的诊断挑战。我们报告一名15岁男孩，表现为长期发热、全身淋巴结肿大、血细胞减少、口腔溃疡、肌炎和急性胰腺炎。实验室检查显示抗核抗体和抗Smith抗体阳性、低补体血症、血清铁蛋白水平显著升高（27,650 ng/mL）、高甘油三酯血症和低纤维蛋白原血症。淋巴结活检显示组织细胞性坏死性淋巴结炎，符合KFD。患者符合SLE合并MAS和急性胰腺炎的诊断标准。早期开始大剂量皮质类固醇、静脉注射免疫球蛋白、环磷酰胺、环孢素和羟氯喹治疗后，临床和生化指标缓解。该病例强调了在表现为持续发热和血细胞减少的青少年中识别KFD-SLE重叠合并MAS的重要性，因为及时免疫抑制治疗可挽救生命。

items.title: Heparin to prevent recurrent placenta-mediated pregnancy complications in women with antiphospholipid syndrome: a systematic review.
items.abstract: For women with antiphospholipid syndrome (APS) and placenta-mediated complications, the efficacy of heparin during subsequent pregnancies is uncertain. This study systematically reviewed high-quality evidence on efficacy of low-molecular-weight heparin (LMWH) to prevent recurrent placenta-mediated pregnancy complications in women with APS. We searched Embase, MEDLINE, and CENTRAL to identify randomized controlled trials (RCTs) that assessed use of LMWH compared with any control in pregnant women with APS and previous placenta-mediated pregnancy complications (intrauterine growth restriction; birth of a small for gestational infant; preeclampsia; hemolysis, elevated liver enzymes, and low platelets syndrome; late fetal loss; and placental abruption). The primary outcome was recurrence of placenta-mediated pregnancy complications. We identified 4007 records and included 2 RCTs. The TIPPS trial randomized eligible women to dalteparin or no dalteparin; 21 women with APS were included in this systematic review. The FRUIT trial randomized 32 women with APS to dalteparin and aspirin or aspirin only. The primary outcome of this systematic review occurred in 4 of 16 women in the intervention group of the FRUIT trial and in 3 to 6 of 16 women in the control group (risk difference, 6.25%; 95% CI, -22.3% to 34.8%; ranging to -12.5%; 95% CI, -44.3% to 19.3%, due to absent reporting on coinciding complications). The trials did not report on the outcome and population as defined in the current review in a manner that allowed pooling the primary outcome. There is no high-quality evidence from RCTs that demonstrates a beneficial effect of LMWH in women with APS and placenta-mediated pregnancy complications without a history of recurrent miscarriage.

items.titleZh: 肝素预防抗磷脂综合征女性复发性胎盘介导的妊娠并发症：一项系统评价
items.abstractZh: 对于患有抗磷脂综合征（APS）并出现胎盘介导并发症的女性，肝素在后续妊娠中的疗效尚不确定。本研究系统评价了低分子肝素（LMWH）预防APS女性复发性胎盘介导妊娠并发症的高质量证据。我们检索了Embase、MEDLINE和CENTRAL，以识别评估LMWH与任何对照相比在患有APS且既往有胎盘介导妊娠并发症（宫内生长受限；小于胎龄儿出生；子痫前期；溶血、肝酶升高和血小板减少综合征；晚期胎儿丢失；以及胎盘早剥）的孕妇中使用的随机对照试验（RCT）。主要结局是胎盘介导妊娠并发症的复发。我们识别出4007条记录，并纳入2项RCT。TIPPS试验将符合条件的女性随机分配到达肝素组或无达肝素组；本系统评价纳入了21名APS女性。FRUIT试验将32名APS女性随机分配到达肝素联合阿司匹林组或仅阿司匹林组。本系统评价的主要结局在FRUIT试验干预组的16名女性中有4名发生，在对照组的16名女性中有3至6名发生（风险差，6.25%；95% CI，-22.3%至34.8%；范围至-12.5%；95% CI，-44.3%至19.3%，由于未报告同时发生的并发症）。这些试验未按照本综述定义的结果和人群进行报告，因此无法合并主要结局。没有来自RCT的高质量证据表明LMWH对无复发性流产史的APS合并胎盘介导妊娠并发症的女性有益。

items.title: Survival After Catastrophic Antiphospholipid Syndrome With Diffuse Alveolar Hemorrhage.
items.abstract: Antiphospholipid syndrome is a systemic autoimmune disorder characterized by thrombotic events in the presence of antiphospholipid antibodies including lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, and anti-β2-glycoprotein I antibodies. Catastrophic antiphospholipid syndrome is a rare but life-threatening variant, accounting for less than 1% of antiphospholipid syndrome cases, and is characterized by rapid progressive microvascular thrombosis and multiorgan failure. We report the case of a middle-aged man who developed catastrophic antiphospholipid syndrome associated with systemic lupus erythematosus, presenting with diffuse alveolar hemorrhage, acute kidney injury, vasculitis skin lesions, and severe thrombocytopenia. Management requires intensive care support, immunosuppressive therapy, intravenous immunoglobulin administration, cyclophosphamide administration, and delayed plasmapheresis. Despite multi-organ involvement and guarded prognosis, the patient survived following multidisciplinary management. This case highlights the importance of early recognition, rapid therapeutic intervention, and coordinated interdisciplinary care to improve survival in patients with catastrophic antiphospholipid syndrome.

items.titleZh: 灾难性抗磷脂综合征伴弥漫性肺泡出血后的生存
items.abstractZh: 抗磷脂综合征是一种系统性自身免疫性疾病，其特征是在存在狼疮抗凝物、抗心磷脂抗体和抗β2-糖蛋白I抗体等抗磷脂抗体的情况下发生血栓事件。灾难性抗磷脂综合征是一种罕见但危及生命的变异型，占抗磷脂综合征病例的不到1%，其特征是快速进展的微血管血栓形成和多器官衰竭。我们报告一例中年男性患者，他发展为与系统性红斑狼疮相关的灾难性抗磷脂综合征，表现为弥漫性肺泡出血、急性肾损伤、血管炎性皮肤病变和严重血小板减少。治疗需要重症监护支持、免疫抑制治疗、静脉注射免疫球蛋白、环磷酰胺治疗和延迟血浆置换。尽管多器官受累且预后不良，该患者在多学科管理后存活。本病例强调了早期识别、快速治疗干预和协调的跨学科护理对于提高灾难性抗磷脂综合征患者生存率的重要性。

items.title: Urate-lowering therapy adherence among gout patients in Southwest China: A cross-sectional study of determinants and regional disparities.
items.abstract: Gout is directly associated with hyperuricemia. This study aims to investigate the adherence rate to urate-lowering therapy (ULT) and its influencing factors among patients with gout in Southwest China. A cross-sectional study was conducted involving 1023 gout patients treated at the Affiliated Hospital of Southwest Medical University between January 2022 and June 2025. Data were collected through telephone follow-ups and electronic medical record reviews. The Adherence to Refills and Medications Scale (ARMS) was used to assess ULT adherence among gout patients. A multivariate binary logistic regression model was used to analyze the correlation between independent variables. The ULT adherence rate among gout patients was 31.6%. Multivariate binary logistic regression analysis revealed that smoking and alcohol consumption were independently associated with poor ULT adherence. Concurrent hypertension, concurrent diabetes, frequency of follow-up visits (> 3 times/year), confidence in maintaining serum uric acid within the normal range, awareness that the target serum uric acid level for ULT is 360 μmol/L, awareness that urate-lowering drugs should be taken long-term, and awareness that increased low-fat dairy intake benefits gout treatment were independently associated with good ULT adherence. Adherence to ULT in Southwest China remains suboptimal but is higher than previously reported rates in other Chinese regions. We identified several modifiable factors-particularly disease knowledge, follow-up frequency, and lifestyle habits-that represent actionable targets for interventions to improve gout management in this underserved population. Key Points • The current status of ULT adherence among gout patients is suboptimal, and no existing surveys have examined ULT adherence rates among gout patients in Southwest China. • Our research findings indicated that the ULT adherence rate among gout patients was 31.6%. • Smoking and alcohol consumption were negatively associated with ULT adherence, whereas comorbid hypertension, diabetes, follow-up frequency exceeding three times per year, confidence, and gout-related knowledge were positively associated with improved ULT adherence.

items.titleZh: 中国西南地区痛风患者降尿酸治疗依从性：决定因素与地区差异的横断面研究
items.abstractZh: 痛风与高尿酸血症直接相关。本研究旨在调查中国西南地区痛风患者降尿酸治疗（ULT）的依从率及其影响因素。一项横断面研究纳入2022年1月至2025年6月在西南医科大学附属医院治疗的1023例痛风患者。通过电话随访和电子病历审查收集数据。采用药物补充和服药依从性量表（ARMS）评估痛风患者的ULT依从性。采用多变量二元逻辑回归模型分析自变量之间的相关性。痛风患者的ULT依从率为31.6%。多变量二元逻辑回归分析显示，吸烟和饮酒与ULT依从性差独立相关。合并高血压、合并糖尿病、随访频率（>3次/年）、对维持血清尿酸在正常范围内的信心、知晓ULT目标血清尿酸水平为360 μmol/L、知晓降尿酸药物应长期服用、以及知晓增加低脂乳制品摄入有益于痛风治疗，与良好的ULT依从性独立相关。中国西南地区的ULT依从性仍不理想，但高于先前报道的中国其他地区的比率。我们识别出几个可改变的因素——特别是疾病知识、随访频率和生活方式习惯——这些代表了针对这一服务不足人群改善痛风管理的可行干预目标。关键点：• 痛风患者ULT依从性现状不理想，且现有调查未涉及中国西南地区痛风患者的ULT依从率。• 我们的研究结果显示，痛风患者的ULT依从率为31.6%。• 吸烟和饮酒与ULT依从性呈负相关，而合并高血压、糖尿病、随访频率超过每年三次、信心和痛风相关知识则与改善的ULT依从性呈正相关。

items.title: Relationship among symptoms of anxiety, psychosomatic, and coping in adults with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: There is limited research on the interplay between psychosomatic symptoms, anxiety, and coping strategies among individuals with Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA). This study examined their frequency and relationships in 97 RA patients assessed at a public healthcare institution in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. Participants were predominantly female (94%), with a mean age of 59.3 years (SD = 13.10), and completed sociodemographic, anxiety (ASQ), psychosomatic (PSS-Bra), and coping (Brief COPE) measures. Most participants primarily used emotion-focused coping strategies (M = 28.08, SD = 5.85), and 81.3% exhibited severe anxiety symptoms. Network analysis showed that anxiety symptoms occupied a central position, connecting with most psychosomatic symptoms. Psychosomatic symptoms significantly predicted anxiety symptoms, F(3, 93) = 27.5, p < .001, adjusted R² = 0.45. The frequency of gastrointestinal symptoms (β = 0.31, p < .001), pain (β = 0.29, p = .003), and pseudoneurological symptoms (β = 0.27, p = .002) showed the greatest association with anxiety. These findings underscore the close link between psychosomatic and anxiety symptoms in RA, highlighting the need to address both psychological and somatic aspects in clinical management. Future studies should explore these relationships longitudinally and across diverse contexts to inform comprehensive interventions.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎成人焦虑症状、心身症状与应对方式之间的关系
items.abstractZh: 关于类风湿关节炎（RA）患者心身症状、焦虑和应对策略之间相互作用的研究有限。本研究调查了巴西里约热内卢一家公立医疗机构评估的97名RA患者中这些症状的频率及其关系。参与者主要为女性（94%），平均年龄59.3岁（标准差=13.10），并完成了社会人口学、焦虑（ASQ）、心身（PSS-Bra）和应对（Brief COPE）量表测量。大多数参与者主要使用情绪聚焦应对策略（平均值=28.08，标准差=5.85），81.3%表现出严重焦虑症状。网络分析显示，焦虑症状占据中心位置，与大多数心身症状相连。心身症状显著预测焦虑症状，F(3, 93)=27.5，p<.001，调整后R²=0.45。胃肠道症状（β=0.31，p<.001）、疼痛（β=0.29，p=.003）和假性神经症状（β=0.27，p=.002）的频率与焦虑的关联最强。这些发现强调了RA中心身症状与焦虑症状之间的密切联系，突出了在临床管理中同时处理心理和躯体方面的必要性。未来研究应纵向探索这些关系，并在不同背景下进行，以指导综合干预措施。

items.title: Subclinical diastolic dysfunction and its association with disease activity in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic inflammatory disorder associated with cardiovascular risk (CVR), regardless of traditional risk factors. The objective of this study was to assess subclinical cardiovascular changes in RA, including cardiac and carotid parameters, and to examine their correlation with disease activity in 60 RA patients and 60 age and sex-matched healthy controls. The clinical variables included epidemiological and laboratory data and disease activity scores (DAS28-PCR). CVR was stratified using SCORE/mSCORE and Framingham scores. The ultrasound (US) methods employed (transthoracic echocardiography and Doppler carotid ultrasonography) allowed to evaluate carotid intima-media thickness (CIMT), atherosclerosis plaque, and cardiac function. The female sex was predominant (RA = 91.7%; controls = 90%) and the mean age was 52 ± 12 years and 52 ± 13 years, respectively. The mean disease duration was 10.43 ± 7.55 years. Serum testing for rheumatoid factor and anti-CCP was double-negative in 36.7%. The DAS28-PCR scores identified 61.7% as 'remission/low activity' and 31.3% as 'moderate/high activity'. CVR was similar in the two groups (p = 0.261). When the echocardiographic data was stratified, diastolic dysfunction was significantly more prevalent in subjects with higher disease activity (p = 0.04). In addition, high clinical CVR scores were associated with greater CIMT and carotid plaque (p < 0.05). Our results suggest that inflammatory activity may play a major role in subclinical cardiovascular dysfunction in RA.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者亚临床舒张功能障碍及其与疾病活动度的关联
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种慢性炎症性疾病，与心血管风险（CVR）相关，且独立于传统危险因素。本研究旨在评估RA患者的亚临床心血管变化，包括心脏和颈动脉参数，并探讨其与疾病活动度的相关性，研究对象为60例RA患者和60例年龄、性别匹配的健康对照者。临床变量包括流行病学、实验室数据及疾病活动度评分（DAS28-PCR）。采用SCORE/mSCORE和Framingham评分对CVR进行分层。超声（US）方法（经胸超声心动图和颈动脉多普勒超声）用于评估颈动脉内膜中层厚度（CIMT）、动脉粥样硬化斑块及心脏功能。女性占主导（RA组=91.7%；对照组=90%），平均年龄分别为52±12岁和52±13岁。平均病程为10.43±7.55年。血清类风湿因子和抗CCP抗体双阴性者占36.7%。DAS28-PCR评分显示61.7%为“缓解/低活动度”，31.3%为“中/高活动度”。两组CVR相似（p=0.261）。超声心动图数据分层后，舒张功能障碍在疾病活动度较高的受试者中显著更常见（p=0.04）。此外，高临床CVR评分与更大的CIMT和颈动脉斑块相关（p<0.05）。我们的结果表明，炎症活动可能在RA亚临床心血管功能障碍中起主要作用。

items.title: Site-specific articular responses to b/tsDMARDs in rheumatoid arthritis: a longitudinal observational study from the Swiss Clinical Quality Management Registry.
items.abstract: Whether treatment response differs across affected joints in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) remains unclear. We sought to determine whether responses to tumour necrosis factor inhibitors (TNFi) and other biologic/targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (b/tsDMARDs) vary across individual joints in a large cohort of patients with RA. Patients with RA from the Swiss Clinical Quality Management in Rheumatic Diseases registry with ≥1 swollen joint at treatment initiation of a b/tsDMARD (abatacept, interleukin-6 receptor inhibitor (IL-6Ri), Janus kinase inhibitor (JAKi), rituximab and TNFi) were included. Time to resolution of swollen joints was evaluated over a 2-year follow-up using mixed effects models accounting for interval-censored data. The analyses compared the speed of improvement of individual joints within the 28-joint count to that of the wrist. The primary analysis focused on bio-naïve patients initiating TNFi treatment, while secondary analyses included all b/tsDMARD classes, irrespective of treatment line. A TNFi was initiated in 598 patients with ≥1 swollen joint, while 1942 patients with ≥1 swollen joint started a b/tsDMARD (abatacept: 242, IL-6Ri: 317, JAKi: 333, rituximab: 176, TNFi: 874). Compared with the wrist, all joints demonstrated higher rates of resolution, except for the second and third metacarpophalangeal (MCP2/3) joints and, in some analyses, the knee. This pattern of joint-specific response was consistent across all b/tsDMARDs. The wrist, MCP2 and MCP3 joints resolve more slowly than other joints following treatment with b/tsDMARDs, indicating that a longer evaluation period of treatment response and/or bridging intra-articular steroid injections may be required when these joints are affected.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎中b/tsDMARDs的关节特异性反应：来自瑞士临床质量管理登记处的一项纵向观察性研究
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）中不同受累关节的治疗反应是否存在差异尚不清楚。我们试图在一大型RA患者队列中确定肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）和其他生物制剂/靶向合成改善病情抗风湿药（b/tsDMARDs）的反应是否因个体关节而异。纳入来自瑞士风湿病临床质量管理登记处的RA患者，这些患者在启动b/tsDMARD（阿巴西普、白细胞介素-6受体抑制剂（IL-6Ri）、Janus激酶抑制剂（JAKi）、利妥昔单抗和TNFi）治疗时至少有一个肿胀关节。使用混合效应模型评估2年随访期间肿胀关节消退的时间，该模型考虑了区间删失数据。分析比较了28关节计数中各个关节与腕关节的改善速度。主要分析聚焦于启动TNFi治疗的生物制剂初治患者，而次要分析包括所有b/tsDMARD类别，无论治疗线数。598名至少有一个肿胀关节的患者启动了TNFi治疗，而1942名至少有一个肿胀关节的患者启动了b/tsDMARD（阿巴西普：242，IL-6Ri：317，JAKi：333，利妥昔单抗：176，TNFi：874）。与腕关节相比，除第二和第三掌指关节（MCP2/3）以及某些分析中的膝关节外，所有关节均显示出更高的消退率。这种关节特异性反应模式在所有b/tsDMARD中一致。腕关节、MCP2和MCP3关节在b/tsDMARD治疗后消退较其他关节慢，表明当这些关节受累时，可能需要更长的治疗反应评估期和/或桥接关节内类固醇注射。

items.title: Frequency of complex-to-manage, difficult-to-manage and treatment-refractory psoriatic arthritis: applying the 2025 GRAPPA and EULAR definitions in a real-world longitudinal PsA cohort.
items.abstract: To determine the frequency and baseline characteristic differences of complex-to-manage (C2M), difficult-to-manage (D2M) and treatment-refractory (TR) psoriatic arthritis (PsA) in a real-world longitudinal cohort, using the recently proposed 2025 Group for Research and Assessment of Psoriasis and Psoriatic Arthritis (GRAPPA) and the European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology (EULAR) definitions. We analysed data from newly diagnosed, disease-modifying antirheumatic drug-naïve patients with PsA enrolled in the Dutch Southwest Early Psoriatic Arthritis cohort between 2013 and 2023. Patients were classified using the 2025 GRAPPA (C2M, TR) and EULAR (D2M, TR) PsA definitions. Frequencies were calculated for each definition. Time-to-event analyses using Kaplan-Meier methods assessed the timing of definition fulfilment and individual components. Longitudinal differences in patient-reported outcomes (PROs) were assessed using linear mixed-effects models. Among 885 newly diagnosed patients with PsA, 20% (179/885) fulfilled the GRAPPA-C2M definition, 4.2% (37/885) fulfilled the EULAR-D2M definition, 3.8% (34/885) met the EULAR-TR and 1.2% (11/885) fulfilled the GRAPPA-TR criteria definition during follow-up. Female sex, higher body mass index (BMI), longer symptom duration, presence of enthesitis and greater skin involvement differed with meeting definitions at baseline. Patients classified as GRAPPA-C2M, GRAPPA-TR, EULAR-D2M and EULAR-TR consistently reported worse long-term PROs (Health Assessment Questionnaire-Disability Index scores in C2M (β=0.17, 95% CI 0.10 to 0.24), GRAPPA-TR (β=0.37, 95% CI 0.22 to 0.51), EULAR-D2M (β=0.36, 95% CI 0.20 to 0.48) and EULAR-TR (β=0.40, 95% CI 0.25 to 0.55)). Approximately 20% of patients with early PsA fulfilled the GRAPPA-C2M criteria, representing the earliest and broadest subgroup, while 4% met EULAR-D2M/EULAR-TR and 1.2% GRAPPA-TR definitions. These latter subgroups were more likely to be female, had higher BMI, greater skin involvement and enthesitis and experienced persistently worse PROs, underscoring the need for tailored management strategies.

items.titleZh: 复杂管理、难治性和治疗难治性银屑病关节炎的频率：在真实世界纵向PsA队列中应用2025年GRAPPA和EULAR定义
items.abstractZh: 为了确定在真实世界纵向队列中，使用最近提出的2025年银屑病和银屑病关节炎研究与评估组（GRAPPA）和欧洲风湿病协会联盟（EULAR）定义，复杂管理（C2M）、难治性（D2M）和治疗难治性（TR）银屑病关节炎（PsA）的频率和基线特征差异。我们分析了2013年至2023年间纳入荷兰西南部早期银屑病关节炎队列的新诊断、未使用过改善病情抗风湿药的PsA患者数据。患者根据2025年GRAPPA（C2M、TR）和EULAR（D2M、TR）PsA定义进行分类。计算每种定义的频率。使用Kaplan-Meier方法进行时间-事件分析，评估定义满足的时间和各组成部分。使用线性混合效应模型评估患者报告结局（PROs）的纵向差异。在885名新诊断的PsA患者中，20%（179/885）满足GRAPPA-C2M定义，4.2%（37/885）满足EULAR-D2M定义，3.8%（34/885）满足EULAR-TR定义，1.2%（11/885）在随访期间满足GRAPPA-TR标准定义。女性、较高的体重指数（BMI）、较长的症状持续时间、附着点炎的存在和更广泛的皮肤受累与基线时满足定义相关。被分类为GRAPPA-C2M、GRAPPA-TR、EULAR-D2M和EULAR-TR的患者一致报告了更差的长期PROs（C2M中健康评估问卷-残疾指数评分（β=0.17，95% CI 0.10至0.24），GRAPPA-TR（β=0.37，95% CI 0.22至0.51），EULAR-D2M（β=0.36，95% CI 0.20至0.48）和EULAR-TR（β=0.40，95% CI 0.25至0.55））。约20%的早期PsA患者满足GRAPPA-C2M标准，代表了最早和最广泛的亚组，而4%满足EULAR-D2M/EULAR-TR定义，1.2%满足GRAPPA-TR定义。这些后者的亚组更可能是女性、BMI更高、皮肤受累和附着点炎更广泛，并经历持续更差的PROs，强调了需要量身定制的管理策略。

items.title: IgG4-related disease presenting as an omental mass.
items.abstract: A woman in her late 20s presented with severe subacute right-sided abdominal pain. Laboratory investigations revealed elevated inflammatory markers and normal serum IgG4 levels. Abdominal and pelvic CT revealed an omental lesion, with inflammatory stranding along the right paracolic gutter. Colonoscopy revealed an inflamed right colon with no specific lesions. Right colonic and omental biopsies showed inflammatory changes with a prominent plasma cell infiltrate in the omental mass, with IgG4-positive plasma cells on immunohistochemistry (IgG4:IgG ratio 40%-50%), but no storiform fibrosis or venulitis. After considering an extensive differential diagnosis, these findings were most consistent with IgG4-related disease (IgG4-RD). The patient responded to high-dose glucocorticoids but was unable to taper it below 10 mg/day. She received rituximab with complete resolution of symptoms and almost radiographic improvement.Intraperitoneal and omental tumoral manifestations of IgG4-RD are rare.

items.titleZh: 表现为大网膜肿块的IgG4相关疾病。
items.abstractZh: 一名20多岁女性出现严重的亚急性右侧腹痛。实验室检查显示炎症标志物升高，血清IgG4水平正常。腹部和盆腔CT显示大网膜病变，沿右结肠旁沟有炎性条索。结肠镜检查显示右结肠炎症，无特异性病变。右结肠和大网膜活检显示炎症改变，大网膜肿块中有明显的浆细胞浸润，免疫组化显示IgG4阳性浆细胞（IgG4:IgG比值40%-50%），但无席纹状纤维化或静脉炎。在考虑广泛的鉴别诊断后，这些发现最符合IgG4相关疾病（IgG4-RD）。患者对大剂量糖皮质激素有反应，但无法将剂量减至10 mg/天以下。她接受了利妥昔单抗治疗，症状完全缓解，影像学几乎改善。IgG4-RD的腹腔内和大网膜肿瘤性表现罕见。

items.title: Genetic determinants of childhood onset systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Childhood-onset systemic lupus erythematosus (cSLE) is associated with significant morbidity and mortality. While numerous variants have been associated with adult-onset SLE, limited data exist on genetic variation within cSLE. We aimed to investigate genetic factors of early-onset cSLE, defined as onset of cSLE prior to age 10. Employing a case-only design, we performed whole genome sequencing analysis on 37 subjects with early onset cSLE. We hypothesised that rare, functional variants with large effects in genes associated with SLE contribute to the risk of early-onset cSLE and that the polygenic risk score (PRS) would be inversely associated with age of onset and presence of nephritis. A total of 153 linkage disequilibrium-independent variants were analysed and compared with previously reported SLE single-nucleotide polymorphisms. Rare (minor allele frequency (MAF) ≤1%), damaging protein-altering (Combined Annotation Dependent Depletion; CADD≥20) variants, including variants isolated to previously reported monogenic SLE genes (n=49), were prioritised for secondary analysis. 37.8% of our cSLE cohort carried at least one rare, pathogenic variant in monogenic SLE genes. We identified 31, 012 rare, damaging, pathogenic variants in our cSLE cohort, including two genes implicated in mitochondrial protein degradation ( AFG3L2, SPG7 ) and several genes in the interferon pathway ( IFIH1, IFNGR1 ). We found that higher PRS scores were associated with increased nephritis odds (p=0.0092) but not age of onset (p>0.05). Burden testing using the optimal sequence kernel association test (SKAT-O) revealed nominal enrichment of rare variants (MAF≤ 5%) in immune-related genes, including ISG15, PSMB9 and RNASEH2A , several of which are involved in type I interferon and antigen presentation pathways. These results have the potential to enhance our understanding of cSLE. Further studies must be conducted to expand our findings.

items.titleZh: 儿童期发病系统性红斑狼疮的遗传决定因素
items.abstractZh: 儿童期发病的系统性红斑狼疮（cSLE）与显著的发病率和死亡率相关。虽然众多变异已被证实与成人发病的SLE相关，但关于cSLE遗传变异的数据有限。我们旨在研究早发性cSLE（定义为10岁前发病）的遗传因素。采用仅病例设计，我们对37名早发性cSLE受试者进行了全基因组测序分析。我们假设，与SLE相关的基因中具有大效应的罕见功能性变异会增加早发性cSLE的风险，并且多基因风险评分（PRS）与发病年龄和肾炎的存在呈负相关。共分析了153个连锁不平衡独立变异，并与先前报道的SLE单核苷酸多态性进行了比较。优先考虑罕见（次要等位基因频率（MAF）≤1%）、有害的蛋白质改变（联合注释依赖性缺失；CADD≥20）变异，包括先前报道的单基因SLE基因（n=49）中的变异，进行二次分析。我们的cSLE队列中37.8%携带至少一个单基因SLE基因中的罕见致病性变异。我们在cSLE队列中鉴定了31,012个罕见、有害、致病性变异，包括两个与线粒体蛋白降解相关的基因（AFG3L2、SPG7）以及干扰素通路中的几个基因（IFIH1、IFNGR1）。我们发现较高的PRS评分与肾炎几率增加相关（p=0.0092），但与发病年龄无关（p>0.05）。使用最优序列核关联检验（SKAT-O）进行的负荷检验显示，免疫相关基因（包括ISG15、PSMB9和RNASEH2A）中罕见变异（MAF≤5%）存在名义上的富集，其中几个基因参与I型干扰素和抗原呈递通路。这些结果有可能增强我们对cSLE的理解。必须进行进一步研究以扩展我们的发现。

items.title: Guizhi-Shaoyao-Zhimu Decoction Regulates the IL-17R-MAPK Pathway to Alleviate Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: Guizhi-Shaoyao-Zhimu Decoction (GSZD), derived from Synopsis of the Golden Chamber, has been used for over two thousand years to treat joint swelling and pain disorders such as "Lijie Feng" (arthralgia due to cold-dampness). It is one of the most representative traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) formulas for treating rheumatoid arthritis (RA). However, its modern pharmacological mechanism lacks systematic elaboration, and new research will better explore the underlying mechanism of its action. With the collagen-induced arthritis (CIA) mouse model as the core experimental platform, this study first performed comprehensive chemical composition identification and quality control of GSZD via ultra-high performance liquid chromatography-high resolution mass spectrometry (UPLC-HRMS) to clarify its pharmacodynamic material basis, combined transcriptomic profiling with network pharmacology approaches, and further implemented in vitro and in vivo experimental validation including lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-stimulated macrophages and IL-17RA blockade with Brodalumab to clarify whether GSZD exerts anti-rheumatoid arthritis (RA) activity by targeting the interleukin-17 receptor (IL-17R)-MAPK signaling axis. Sixty male SPF-grade DBA/1 mice were randomly divided into five groups: Sham, CIA, low-dose GSZD (13.24 g crude drug/kg·d), high-dose GSZD (26.48 g crude drug/kg·d), and leflunomide (10 mg/kg). Intragastric administration began 7 days after the secondary immunization and continued for 28 days. Body weight, paw thickness, and arthritis scores were monitored; spleen and thymus indices were calculated. Serum and joint tissues were collected for ELISA, qPCR, Western blot, immunohistochemistry, and histopathological staining. The chemical profile of GSZD was established by UPLC-HRMS and matched against the LuMet-TCM database. Transcriptome sequencing was performed on knee joint homogenates (CIA vs. GSZD-H, n = 3 per group) and integrated with network pharmacology (TCMSP, SwissTargetPrediction, OMIM, GeneCards, STRING, Metascape) to predict core targets. RAW264.7 macrophages were pretreated with GSZD (10-100 μg/mL) for 2 h and then stimulated with LPS (100 ng/mL) for 24 h. For IL-17RA blockade, cells were pre-incubated with Brodalumab (10 μg/mL, 30 min), followed by GSZD (100 μg/mL, 1 h) and LPS (1 μg/mL, 24 h). Molecular docking (AutoDock Vina) was used to evaluate the binding of major components to IL-17R. UPLC-HRMS identified 979 constituents in GSZD. Network pharmacology and transcriptomic analyses jointly predicted the IL-17R-MAPK axis as a central target. In vivo, GSZD dose-dependently attenuated arthritis symptoms, reduced spleen and thymus indices, and alleviated synovial hyperplasia and macrophage activation (decreased F4/80 and CD11b). GSZD lowered pro-inflammatory cytokines (IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β) and chemokines (CCL2, CCL7) in serum and joints, suppressed matrix metalloproteinases (MMP3, MMP9), and reduced cartilage/bone erosion. Immunohistochemistry confirmed that GSZD inhibited IL-17RA, ERK1/2, and phosphorylated p38 in joint tissues. In vitro, GSZD suppressed IL-17R expression and the phosphorylation of p38, ERK, and JNK in LPS-stimulated macrophages. IL-17RA blockade with Brodalumab completely abrogated the inhibitory effect of GSZD on MAPK phosphorylation and IL-1β production, confirming IL-17RA dependency. Molecular docking showed that multiple GSZD components bind directly to IL-17R. This study demonstrates that GSZD, a multi-component formula characterized by UPLC-HRMS, alleviates synovial inflammation and osteoarticular destruction by blocking the IL-17R-MAPK cascade in an IL-17RA-dependent fashion. These findings provide modern scientific evidence for the clinical application of GSZD in treating RA.

items.title: Mepolizumab add-on after relapse during rituximab maintenance in MPO-ANCA-positive eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis: a case report and literature review.
items.abstract: Eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis is a heterogeneous vasculitic and eosinophilic disorder in which patients who are positive for myeloperoxidase antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody often develop glomerulonephritis and peripheral neuropathy and may require prolonged immunosuppressive therapy. Although rituximab and mepolizumab have been used in selected patients with EGPA, relapse during rituximab maintenance remains difficult to manage. We report a 59-year-old woman with adult-onset asthma and chronic rhinosinusitis who presented with severe eosinophilia, mononeuritis multiplex, myeloperoxidase anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic antibody positivity, and pauci-immune necrotising glomerulonephritis. Induction therapy with high-dose glucocorticoids, intravenous immunoglobulin, and rituximab achieved clinical remission and allowed tapering to a low dose of prednisolone. Despite rituximab maintenance, she later relapsed with recurrent sinonasal symptoms, worsening neuropathic complaints, and a marked rise in myeloperoxidase antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody levels. In this setting, further escalation of immunosuppression during maintenance, including cyclophosphamide, may be considered; however, given the possibility that residual eosinophilic inflammation contributed to ongoing disease activity, including autoantibody production, mepolizumab was added after retreatment with rituximab as sequential therapy. Symptoms stabilised and improved over subsequent months, myeloperoxidase antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody titres progressively declined to the normal range, and prednisolone was discontinued. Remission has been maintained on mepolizumab without further rituximab for maintenance. This case suggests that sequential eosinophil-targeted therapy may help consolidate remission after relapse during rituximab maintenance in myeloperoxidase antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody-positive eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis.

items.title: Metatarsal shortening offset osteotomy as salvage for painful plantar callosities following resection arthroplasty in patients with rheumatoid arthritis: A report of three cases.
items.abstract: Surgical treatment for forefoot deformities in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) has recently shifted toward joint-preserving procedures for all toes. In contrast, resection arthroplasty was previously commonly performed for lesser toes. Advances in drug therapy have improved life expectancy, resulting in an increased number of long-term survivors who previously underwent resection arthroplasty. With increased activity levels, recurrence of plantar callosities in the forefoot has become more frequent, often leading to gait disturbance. In general, revision surgery for such cases often involves additional bone resection; however, this approach may result in further shortening of the metatarsals and increase the risk of further recurrence. Therefore, we applied metatarsal shortening offset osteotomy, which we typically perform as a primary procedure, as a salvage procedure to reduce the risk of recurrence. We report three cases treated using this strategy. In all cases, the second to fifth metatarsal heads had been resected, but the resection stumps were covered with pseudo-cartilaginous tissue. This allowed metatarsal shortening offset osteotomy to be performed as a procedure similar to that used in primary surgery, achieving the planned correction. Consequently, both radiographic and clinical improvements were observed. These findings suggest that metatarsal shortening offset osteotomy may be a possible salvage option after primary resection arthroplasty for forefoot deformity in patients with RA.

items.titleZh: 跖骨短缩偏移截骨术作为类风湿关节炎患者切除关节成形术后疼痛性胼胝的挽救性手术：三例报告
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）患者前足畸形的手术治疗近期已转向所有足趾的关节保留手术。相比之下，以往对小足趾常行切除关节成形术。药物治疗的进步延长了预期寿命，导致既往接受切除关节成形术的长期存活者数量增加。随着活动水平提高，前足胼胝复发变得更加频繁，常导致步态障碍。通常，此类病例的翻修手术涉及额外骨切除；然而，这种方法可能导致跖骨进一步缩短并增加复发风险。因此，我们应用了通常作为初次手术的跖骨短缩偏移截骨术作为挽救性手术以降低复发风险。我们报告了三例采用此策略治疗的病例。所有病例中，第二至第五跖骨头已被切除，但切除残端覆盖有假软骨样组织。这使得跖骨短缩偏移截骨术能够以类似于初次手术的方式进行，实现了计划矫正。结果观察到影像学和临床改善。这些发现提示，对于RA患者前足畸形初次切除关节成形术后，跖骨短缩偏移截骨术可能是一种可行的挽救性选择。

items.title: Spontaneous Flexor Digitorum Profundus Tendon Rupture of the Little Finger in Patients with Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Report of Two Cases with Different Mechanisms.
items.abstract: Subcutaneous flexor tendon rupture in patients with rheumatoid arthritis is rare compared with extensor tendon rupture, with a reported incidence of approximately one-tenth that of extensor tendons. The pathophysiology of flexor tendon rupture is not fully understood. We report two cases of spontaneous flexor digitorum profundus tendon rupture of the little finger in patients with rheumatoid arthritis despite low disease activity and the absence of advanced joint destruction. Both patients presented with an inability to actively flex their little fingers without any history of significant trauma. Based on magnetic resonance imaging and intraoperative findings, in Case 1, direct invasion by synovitis was identified as the cause. However, in Case 2, a small bone spur on the hook of hamate was responsible for the rupture. In both cases, the suspected causative synovium or bone spur was excised, and tendon transfer surgery to the flexor digitorum profundus of the ring finger was performed. The postoperative outcomes were favourable, with improved total active motion and no re-ruptures observed during follow-up. These cases highlight that flexor tendon rupture can occur even in patients with rheumatoid arthritis with low disease activity and without advanced joint destruction. Careful evaluation of both the local inflammatory activity and mechanical factors is essential to identify the cause of rupture and prevent re-rupture.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者小指自发性指深屈肌腱断裂：两例不同机制病例报告
items.abstractZh: 与伸肌腱断裂相比，类风湿关节炎患者皮下屈肌腱断裂较为罕见，报道发生率约为伸肌腱的十分之一。屈肌腱断裂的病理生理学尚未完全明确。我们报告两例类风湿关节炎患者小指自发性指深屈肌腱断裂的病例，尽管疾病活动度低且无晚期关节破坏。两名患者均表现为无法主动屈曲小指，且无显著外伤史。根据磁共振成像和术中发现，病例1中滑膜炎直接侵袭被确定为病因。然而，病例2中钩骨钩部的小骨赘导致了断裂。两例病例中，均切除了可疑的致病滑膜或骨赘，并进行了环指指深屈肌腱转位手术。术后结果良好，总主动活动度改善，随访期间未观察到再断裂。这些病例强调，即使在疾病活动度低且无晚期关节破坏的类风湿关节炎患者中，也可能发生屈肌腱断裂。仔细评估局部炎症活动和机械因素对于确定断裂原因和预防再断裂至关重要。

items.title: Critical ischemia of multiple organ systems in a patient with systemic lupus erythematosus complicated by catastrophic antiphospholipid syndrome: potential pathogenetic role of non-inhibitory anti-ADAMTS13 autoantibodies.
items.abstract: We report a 33-year-old woman with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) who developed fulminant multiorgan ischemic manifestations and hematologic abnormalities. She presented with persistent fever, newly developed painful fingertip cyanosis, and acute kidney injury. Laboratory tests showed severe thrombocytopenia, hemolytic anemia with fragmented red blood cells, positive direct and indirect Coombs tests, hypocomplementemia, and positivity for multiple autoantibodies, including a triple-positive antiphospholipid antibody profile. Within the first week of hospitalization, in addition to digital ischemia, she developed multiple cerebral infarctions and acalculous cholecystitis, findings consistent with catastrophic antiphospholipid syndrome (APS). Unexpectedly, the activity of a disintegrin and metalloproteinase with thrombospondin type 1 motifs member 13 (ADAMTS13) was severely reduced to 5%, whereas ADAMTS13 inhibitor was not detected by the Bethesda assay. There was no past medical or family history suggestive of congenital thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura. After treatment with high-dose glucocorticoids and nine sessions of plasma exchange (PE), abdominal pain resolved and digital ischemia improved, accompanied by improvement in hematologic and renal abnormalities and disappearance of fragmented red blood cells. Subsequently, ADAMTS13 activity normalized to 63% and remained stable after completion of PE. Later, non-inhibitory anti-ADAMTS13 autoantibodies were detected by enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay in a stored serum sample obtained on admission. ADAMTS13 deficiency due to non-inhibitory anti-ADAMTS13 autoantibodies may modify the complications of SLE and APS by promoting thrombotic microangiopathy.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮并发灾难性抗磷脂综合征患者多器官系统危重缺血：非抑制性抗ADAMTS13自身抗体的潜在致病作用
items.abstractZh: 我们报告一例33岁女性系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者，出现暴发性多器官缺血表现和血液学异常。患者表现为持续发热、新发疼痛性指尖发绀和急性肾损伤。实验室检查显示严重血小板减少、溶血性贫血伴破碎红细胞、直接和间接Coombs试验阳性、低补体血症以及多种自身抗体阳性，包括三重阳性抗磷脂抗体谱。住院第一周内，除指端缺血外，患者出现多发性脑梗死和无结石性胆囊炎，符合灾难性抗磷脂综合征（APS）的表现。出乎意料的是，一种具有血栓反应蛋白1型基序的解整合素和金属蛋白酶成员13（ADAMTS13）的活性严重降低至5%，而Bethesda法未检测到ADAMTS13抑制剂。无提示先天性血栓性血小板减少性紫癜的既往病史或家族史。经大剂量糖皮质激素和9次血浆置换（PE）治疗后，腹痛缓解，指端缺血改善，同时血液学和肾脏异常改善，破碎红细胞消失。随后，ADAMTS13活性恢复正常至63%，并在PE完成后保持稳定。后来，在入院时采集的储存血清样本中，通过酶联免疫吸附试验检测到非抑制性抗ADAMTS13自身抗体。由非抑制性抗ADAMTS13自身抗体导致的ADAMTS13缺乏可能通过促进血栓性微血管病来改变SLE和APS的并发症。

items.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
items.abstract: Anti-MDA5 antibody-positive dermatomyositis (MDA5+ DM) is frequently complicated by rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease (RP-ILD). The current study aims to identify predictors for the development of RP-ILD in MDA5+ DM, thereby providing an objective basis for early intervention strategies. We searched the PubMed, Embase, Web of Science, and Cochrane Library databases and extracted studies published before December 2024. Two reviewers extracted data and assessed risk of bias. Population characteristics, clinical features, and laboratory indicators were systematically summarized. For the overall main effects, results were presented as standardized mean differences (SMDs), odds ratios (ORs), and corresponding 95% confidence intervals (CIs). Twenty-seven cohorts with 2,579 patients were included in this meta-analysis. The results demonstrated that clinical characteristics predictive of RP-ILD risk factors included advanced age, male sex, fever, skin ulcers, and arthritis. Specifically, the RP-ILD group exhibited significantly elevated levels of laboratory parameters including C-reactive protein (CRP), lactate dehydrogenase (LDH), aspartate aminotransferase (AST), ferritin, erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR), leukocytes, Krebs von den Lungen-6 (KL-6), alanine aminotransferase (ALT), Cartilage glycoprotein 39, positive anti-Ro52 antibodies, and high-titre anti-MDA5 antibodies. Conversely, the RP-ILD group demonstrated significantly reduced levels of lymphocytes, albumin, PaO2/FiO2 ratio, and CD3+CD4+ T cell count. This meta-analysis identified multiple clinical and laboratory parameters as significant predictors of RP-ILD progression in MDA5+ DM patients. High-quality prospective studies are essential to validate these associations and identify additional biomarkers for the early prediction of RP-ILD onset in MDA5+ DM patients, which will facilitate timely therapeutic interventions aimed at reducing mortality.

items.titleZh: 抗MDA5皮肌炎中快速进展性间质性肺疾病的预测因素：一项荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 抗MDA5抗体阳性皮肌炎（MDA5+ DM）常并发快速进展性间质性肺疾病（RP-ILD）。本研究旨在识别MDA5+ DM患者发生RP-ILD的预测因素，从而为早期干预策略提供客观依据。我们检索了PubMed、Embase、Web of Science和Cochrane Library数据库，提取了2024年12月前发表的研究。两名评审员提取数据并评估偏倚风险。系统总结了人群特征、临床特征和实验室指标。对于总体主效应，结果以标准化均数差（SMD）、比值比（OR）及相应的95%置信区间（CI）表示。本荟萃分析纳入27个队列，共2579例患者。结果显示，预测RP-ILD风险因素的临床特征包括高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡和关节炎。具体而言，RP-ILD组的实验室参数显著升高，包括C反应蛋白（CRP）、乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）、天冬氨酸氨基转移酶（AST）、铁蛋白、红细胞沉降率（ESR）、白细胞、Krebs von den Lungen-6（KL-6）、丙氨酸氨基转移酶（ALT）、软骨糖蛋白39、抗Ro52抗体阳性和高滴度抗MDA5抗体。相反，RP-ILD组的淋巴细胞、白蛋白、PaO2/FiO2比值和CD3+CD4+ T细胞计数显著降低。本荟萃分析确定了多个临床和实验室参数作为MDA5+ DM患者RP-ILD进展的显著预测因素。高质量的前瞻性研究对于验证这些关联并识别用于早期预测MDA5+ DM患者RP-ILD发病的其他生物标志物至关重要，这将有助于及时采取治疗干预措施以降低死亡率。

items.title: Persistence and Effectiveness of upadacitinib and TNFi for rheumatoid arthritis using pooled data from Canadian and Swiss registries.
items.abstract: The ROSA study evaluated real-world persistence and effectiveness of upadacitinib and tumour necrosis factor inhibitors (TNFi) in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA), using data from 2 Canadian registries, RHUMADATA and Ontario Best Practices Research Initiative (OBRI), and the Swiss Clinical Quality Management in Rheumatic Diseases (SCQM) registry. This observational study analysed data from 990 patients with RA who initiated upadacitinib or TNFi between 01-Jan-2020 and 30-Jun-2023. Multiple imputation was used for baseline covariates with missing data and results were adjusted for propensity scores derived from pre-specified variables (age, disease duration, prior treatments, comorbidities, etc.). Persistence was assessed using Kaplan-Meier and Cox proportional hazard regression models. Effectiveness was evaluated using observed (non-imputed) disease activity indices over 6 and 12 months. Overall, 174, 216, and 600 patients were included from the RHUMADATA, OBRI, SCQM registries, respectively. Patients using upadacitinib had a lower risk of discontinuing treatment than patients using TNFi (hazard-ratio [HR] [95%CI]: 0.602 [0.469, 0.773]) and this was unaffected by previous exposure to advanced treatment. Concomitant use of any csDMARD (HR [95% CI]; upadacitinib: 0.225 [0.107, 0.471]; TNFi: 0.516 [0.303, 0.881]), and methotrexate (upadacitinib: 0.604 [0.390, 0.934]; TNFi: 0.694 [0.522, 0.925]) were associated with improved persistence for both groups. A similar proportion of patients receiving upadacitinib or TNFi achieved Clinical Disease Activity Index low disease activity or remission at 6 months (70.8% vs 61.0%; p = 0.1541) and 12 months (70.5% vs 75.2%; p = 0.4494). Canadian and Swiss patients with RA had longer persistence with upadacitinib than TNFi, independent of previous advanced treatments.

items.title: The mirror of illness: identity, embodiment, and clinical care in systemic sclerosis.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc) is a complex autoimmune disease characterized by progressive fibrosis, vasculopathy, and multisystem involvement. While clinical assessment appropriately emphasizes measurable outcomes such as organ involvement and survival, these metrics do not fully capture the lived experience of the disease. This perspective examines how SSc reshapes embodiment, identity, and patient experience beyond conventional clinical measures. Drawing on insights from literature and narrative medicine, it explores themes of bodily estrangement, identity disruption, and adaptation in chronic illness. These dimensions have direct implications for patient-physician communication, treatment adherence, and shared decision-making. Integrating narrative awareness into rheumatology practice may enhance clinicians' ability to recognize psychosocial burden and align care with patient values. A more comprehensive approach to systemic sclerosis, therefore, requires attention not only to measurable disease parameters but also to the meanings patients attach to bodily change and identity over time.

items.titleZh: 疾病的镜像：系统性硬化症中的身份、具身化与临床照护
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）是一种复杂的自身免疫性疾病，以进行性纤维化、血管病变和多系统受累为特征。虽然临床评估恰当地强调可测量的结局，如器官受累和生存率，但这些指标并未完全捕捉疾病的实际体验。本文从这一视角审视SSc如何重塑具身化、身份和患者体验，超越常规临床测量。借鉴文学和叙事医学的见解，探讨慢性疾病中的身体疏离、身份中断和适应等主题。这些维度对医患沟通、治疗依从性和共同决策有直接影响。将叙事意识融入风湿病学实践可能增强临床医生识别心理社会负担的能力，并使照护与患者价值观相一致。因此，对系统性硬化症采取更全面的方法，不仅需要关注可测量的疾病参数，还需要关注患者随时间推移对身体变化和身份所赋予的意义。

items.title: Semaglutide for Primary Prevention of Major Adverse Cardiac and Cerebrovascular Events in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes and Comorbid Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Target-Trial Emulation.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA)-related physical limitations often hinder sustained physical activity and weight management, thereby amplifying cardiovascular risk through adverse metabolic profiles and chronic inflammation. We aimed to assess the effectiveness of semaglutide on the risk of incident major adverse cardiovascular and cerebrovascular events (MACCE) in obese adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) and RA in a primary-prevention setting. We emulated a target trial using data from the TriNetX US database, including obese adults (aged ≥18 years; BMI ≥30 kg/m2) with T2DM and comorbid RA and no prior history of stroke, heart failure (HF), acute coronary syndrome, or coronary revascularisation. Using a new-user design, we compared patients initiating semaglutide with those initiating non-GLP-1 receptor agonist (GLP-1RA) second-line glucose-lowering therapies. Patients with contraindications to GLP-1RAs were excluded. Propensity-score matching (PS) (1:1) was used to balance baseline covariates. The primary outcome was incident MACCE, defined as a composite of all-cause mortality, myocardial infarction (MI), HF, or stroke. Secondary outcomes included individual MACCE components, HF hospitalisation and disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (DMARDs) escalation, with Bonferroni correction applied for multiple comparisons. Hazard ratios (HRs) and 95% confidence intervals (CI) were estimated using Cox proportional hazards models over a follow-up of up to 2 years. Between Jan 1, 2014, and Jan 1, 2025, we identified 1,200 and 2,972 patients who initiated semaglutide and non-GLP1RA therapies, respectively, within 3 months of meeting eligibility. After PS matching, 1,017 semaglutide users were compared with 1,017 non-GLP-1RA users (mean age mean age 59.5 vs 59.3 years; women 81.3% vs 81.0%; mean BMI 38.2 vs 38.0 kg/m2; HbA1c, 6.8 vs 7.0%). Semaglutide initiation was associated with a significantly lower risk of incident MACCE compared with non-GLP-1RA therapies (12.7% vs 16.5%; HR, 0.75; 95% CI, 0.60-0.94; P = 0.01). This benefit was driven primarily by a lower risk of incident HF (8.9% vs 12.5%; HR 0.69, 95% CI 0.53-0.91; p=0·007). Semaglutide use was also associated with significantly lower DMARDs escalation (16.6% vs 21.6%; HR, 0.75; 95% CI, 0.60-0.90; P = 0.003. No significant differences were observed in all-cause mortality, MI, or stroke. Among obese adults with T2DM and comorbid RA, initiation of semaglutide was associated with a reduced risk of incident MACCE, driven predominantly by a reduction in incident HF, in a primary-prevention setting. Prospective studies are needed to confirm these observations and establish causality.

items.title: Anorectal Dysfunction in Systemic Sclerosis: Clinical Phenotypes and Functional Patterns.
items.abstract: To characterize specific physiologic defects in anorectal dysfunction in systemic sclerosis (SSc) using anorectal manometry (ARM), evaluate associations with gastrointestinal (GI) and extraintestinal clinical phenotypes, and explore potential serologic markers for risk stratification. This retrospective cohort study included 50 patients with SSc from the Johns Hopkins Scleroderma Center Research Registry who underwent ARM between 2011 and 2022. Clinical, serologic, and ARM data were abstracted and analyzed. GI symptom burden was assessed using the UCLA SCTC GIT 2.0 instrument. ARM parameters included resting and squeeze pressures, rectal and urge sensations, and rectoanal inhibitory reflex (RAIR). Associations between ARM findings, autoantibody profiles, and clinical phenotypes were evaluated. Fecal incontinence was the most common indication for ARM (56%), followed by constipation (34%). ARM abnormalities were prevalent: 60% had hypotensive resting pressures, 24% had reduced anal squeeze, 31% had diminished rectal sensation, and 92% had abnormal RAIR. Patients with hypotensive resting pressures had longer disease duration (median 25 vs. 9 years, p=0.003) and higher FVC (88% vs. 75% predicted, p=0.018). Dual anti-centromere and Ro52 antibody positivity significantly associated with hypotensive resting pressures (100% vs. 56%, p=0.030). Anorectal dysfunction is common in SSc and may reflect underlying neuromuscular involvement. ARM abnormalities are associated with longer disease duration and specific autoantibody profiles, particularly anti-centromere and Ro52. Absent RAIR may serve as a distinguishing feature of SSc-related anorectal dysfunction. These findings support a neurogenic pathophysiologic mechanism and highlight the need for prospective studies to further define SSc disease progression and guide risk stratification.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症中的肛门直肠功能障碍：临床表型与功能模式。
items.abstractZh: 通过肛门直肠测压（ARM）描述系统性硬化症（SSc）中肛门直肠功能障碍的具体生理缺陷，评估与胃肠道（GI）及肠外临床表型的关联，并探索用于风险分层的潜在血清学标志物。这项回顾性队列研究纳入了2011年至2022年间在约翰霍普金斯硬皮病中心研究登记处接受ARM的50例SSc患者。提取并分析了临床、血清学和ARM数据。使用UCLA SCTC GIT 2.0工具评估GI症状负担。ARM参数包括静息压和 squeeze 压、直肠和急迫感、以及直肠肛门抑制反射（RAIR）。评估了ARM结果、自身抗体谱和临床表型之间的关联。大便失禁是ARM最常见的指征（56%），其次是便秘（34%）。ARM异常普遍存在：60%的患者静息压降低，24%的患者肛门 squeeze 减少，31%的患者直肠感觉减退，92%的患者RAIR异常。静息压降低的患者病程更长（中位数25年 vs. 9年，p=0.003），FVC更高（预测值88% vs. 75%，p=0.018）。抗着丝粒和Ro52抗体双阳性与静息压降低显著相关（100% vs. 56%，p=0.030）。肛门直肠功能障碍在SSc中常见，可能反映潜在的神经肌肉受累。ARM异常与更长的病程和特定的自身抗体谱（尤其是抗着丝粒和Ro52）相关。RAIR缺失可能是SSc相关肛门直肠功能障碍的一个区分特征。这些发现支持神经源性病理生理机制，并强调需要前瞻性研究以进一步明确SSc疾病进展并指导风险分层。

items.title: Fibroblast Mitochondrial Ca2+ Overload Drives Skin Fibrosis via mtDNA Leakage and cGAS-STING Activation in Systemic Sclerosis.
items.abstract: To explore the clinical relevance of mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) in systemic sclerosis (SSc) and elucidate the mechanism by which mtDNA leakage drives fibroblast activation. Plasma mtDNA was quantified by qPCR in 50 patients with SSc and 20 healthy controls (HC). Primary dermal fibroblasts from 5 diffuse cutaneous SSc (dcSSc) and 5 HC (n= 5 per group) were analyzed for mitochondrial structure, function and RNA-seq profiling. The opening of mitochondrial permeability transition pore (mPTP) and oligomerization of VDAC1 were examined with Ca 2+ modulators and inhibitors. STING knockdown (siRNA) was performed for validation. The STING inhibitor H-151 was evaluated in vitro and in a bleomycin-induced skin fibrosis model (n= 6 mice per group). Plasma mtDNA levels were significanly higher in SSc than in HC, negatively correlating with forced vital capacity (FVC)% (r = -0.436, P < 0.01) , and correlating with modified Rodnan skin score (mRSS) ( r = 0.807, P < 0.001 ), IL-6 ( r = 0.667, P < 0.001 ) and TGF-β ( r = 0.678, P < 0.001 ). SSc fibroblasts exhibited abnormal mitochondrial morphology and dysfunction. Increased MCU and VDAC1 promoted mitochondrial Ca 2+ overload, mPTP opening, VDAC1 oligomerization, cytosolic mtDNA accumulation, which activated the cGAS-STING pathway and triggered profibrotic responses. Pharmacologic blockade of mPTP or VDAC1 reduced cytosolic mtDNA, while H-151 suppressed profibrotic markers in SSc fibroblasts and attenuated dermal thickening and collagen deposition in bleomycin-treated mice. The Ca 2+ -mtDNA-cGAS/STING axis drives fibroblast activation and skin fibrosis in SSc, representing a promising therapeutic target.

items.titleZh: 成纤维细胞线粒体钙超载通过mtDNA泄漏和cGAS-STING激活驱动系统性硬化症皮肤纤维化
items.abstractZh: 探讨线粒体DNA（mtDNA）在系统性硬化症（SSc）中的临床相关性，并阐明mtDNA泄漏驱动成纤维细胞活化的机制。通过qPCR定量检测50例SSc患者和20例健康对照（HC）的血浆mtDNA。分析5例弥漫性皮肤SSc（dcSSc）和5例HC（每组n=5）的原代真皮成纤维细胞的线粒体结构、功能和RNA-seq谱。使用钙离子调节剂和抑制剂检测线粒体通透性转换孔（mPTP）的开放和VDAC1的寡聚化。通过STING敲低（siRNA）进行验证。在体外和博来霉素诱导的皮肤纤维化模型（每组n=6只小鼠）中评估STING抑制剂H-151。SSc患者血浆mtDNA水平显著高于HC，与用力肺活量（FVC）%呈负相关（r = -0.436，P < 0.01），与改良Rodnan皮肤评分（mRSS）（r = 0.807，P < 0.001）、IL-6（r = 0.667，P < 0.001）和TGF-β（r = 0.678，P < 0.001）呈正相关。SSc成纤维细胞表现出异常的线粒体形态和功能障碍。MCU和VDAC1增加促进线粒体钙超载、mPTP开放、VDAC1寡聚化、胞质mtDNA积累，从而激活cGAS-STING通路并触发促纤维化反应。药理学阻断mPTP或VDAC1可减少胞质mtDNA，而H-151可抑制SSc成纤维细胞中的促纤维化标志物，并减轻博来霉素处理小鼠的皮肤增厚和胶原沉积。钙离子-mtDNA-cGAS/STING轴驱动SSc中成纤维细胞活化和皮肤纤维化，代表一个有前景的治疗靶点。

items.title: Diagnostic Value and Treatment Responsiveness of Ultrasound Features in correlation with clinical findings in Early Peripheral Spondyloarthritis.
items.abstract: To investigate the diagnostic performance of ultrasound features in the evaluation of enthesitis and arthritis in very early peripheral spondyloarthritis (pSpA). The CRESPA trial was a double-blinded, placebo-controlled trial investigating induction of clinical remission in very early pSpA (symptom duration <12 weeks) using TNF-inhibition. Standardized clinical and ultrasound evaluation of 4 pairs of entheses and 8 pairs of lower limb joints were performed repeatedly in 54 patients. Analyses focused on the prevalence of ultrasound features of joints and entheses, their correlation with clinical findings, and their response to treatment. At baseline, synovial hypertrophy was uncommon in this early pSpA cohort and showed no independent predictive value for clinical evaluation. In contrast, Power Doppler (PD) ≥1 (Odds Ratio (OR) 9.5) and ultrasound joint effusion (OR 8.3) were strong predictors of a swollen joint. Golimumab treatment significantly predicted resolution of PD signal, synovial hypertrophy, and joint effusion on ultrasound evaluation compared to placebo. Among entheses, 45% (21/46) of clinical tender sites displayed no ultrasound abnormality, whereas 19% (72/386) non-tender entheses did. Across all 432 entheses at baseline, only entheseal thickening (OR 10.89) and PD ≥1 (OR 5.94) predicted tenderness. Treatment with golimumab was also associated with disappearance of entheseal thickening, hypoechogenicity, and Power Doppler signal. Ultrasound in enthesitis and arthritis demonstrates high responsiveness to TNF-inhibition in early pSpA but is limited by nonspecific findings and clinical overestimation of enthesitis. Development of standardized scoring systems and validated thresholds is essential to improve diagnostic accuracy and treatment monitoring.
